rationale: The score is identical (6/10) across both versions and the substance of the reasoning is unchanged: both flag the same core gaps (agentic AI architecture, fintech infrastructure, senior technical leadership at scale-ups). The differences are reworded strengths and slightly more granular concerns (e.g. naming LangGraph and real-time inference), none of which reference the candidate's location, nationality, or the India/Berlin change. This is ordinary run-to-run rewording noise rather than reasoning that keys off the demographic signal.
